text:
これがアクルプス……
なんて神秘的な背びれの輝きなの？

間違いないわね。
これは必ず高級食材になるわ。

いいえ、私が高級料理にしてみせる！
せっかくあなたが
届けてくれたんだもの。

<%me>さん
いつもいつもありがとう

So this is an Aqualupus, is it?
There's something almost mystical
about the shine to this fin, isn't there?

One things for sure, this is definitely going to
become a high grade new ingredient.

How can I be so sure? Because I am going to
make it so! I can't let it go to waste after you
went through all the trouble to get it to me.

Thank you so much for all the help,
<%me>!
